input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8879 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.conscrypt:conscrypt-openjdk-uber:1.4.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Conscrypt loads an embedded JNI library by extracting it to the JVM temp/work directory; unusual noexec or unwritable temp directories could require org.conscrypt.native.workdir, but there is no concrete evidence that this workflow needs that setup.

Meaningful tests should avoid live external TLS services and can exercise Conscrypt locally through Conscrypt.checkAvailability(), Conscrypt.newProvider(), SSLContext, SSLEngine, key generation, and trust-manager paths.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: the resolved conscrypt-openjdk-uber 1.4.1 artifact has no Maven dependencies and the uber JAR already embeds the platform native libraries needed for normal Conscrypt provider, SSLContext, SSLEngine, key, and trust-manager coverage.
